title: lathyrus altaicus var. humilis
intro: Lathyrus altaicus var. humilis is a type of flowering plant, specifically a low-growing perennial pea species in the Fabaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Lathyrus altaicus var. humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
